name: Nolzur's Marvelous Pigments
description: This fine wooden box contains 1d4 pots of pigment and a brush (weighing 1 pound in total).

properties.contents: 1d4 pots of pigment and brush (1 pound total)

painting.scope: Any number of 3D objects and terrain features (walls, doors, trees, flowers, weapons, webs, pits)
painting.failure: Breaking Concentration or leaving Cube before completion causes painted elements to vanish and pigment wasted

properties.materialization: When work is done, painted objects and terrain become real
properties.value_limit: No object can have value greater than 25 GP; total value per pot max 500 GP
properties.counterfeits: Painted objects of greater value look authentic but reveal as paste, cookies, etc. on inspection
properties.energy: Painted energy forms (fire, lightning) dissipate harmlessly on completion
